name: Sohaib Irfan
tagline: I build backend systems and AI applications in Python — and photograph the inside of video games.
intro: I'm an MCA graduate who got hooked on the unglamorous parts of software: retrieval pipelines, schema design, the control loop inside an AI agent. I've built and deployed RAG systems and tool-using agents with FastAPI, PostgreSQL and pgvector — not from a framework, but from the ground up, because I wanted to know what was actually happening.
When I'm not working, I'm usually inside a game with the HUD switched off, hunting for a frame worth keeping. That habit has its own wing on this site.
about: I'm Sohaib — an MCA graduate from Kolkata who fell for the unglamorous parts of software: retrieval pipelines, schema design, the control loop inside an AI agent. I've built and deployed RAG systems and tool-using agents with FastAPI, PostgreSQL and pgvector, mostly from scratch, because I wanted to know what was actually happening underneath the frameworks.

Right now I'm looking for my first AI engineering or Python backend role, remote or onsite. I learn fastest with a real problem in front of me — which is why everything on this site is something I actually built, shipped, and wrote up by hand.
Away from the terminal I'm usually inside a game with the HUD switched off, hunting for a frame worth keeping. The photography wing of this site is that habit, archived.
contactLine: Hiring for an AI or backend role? Want to talk RAG pipelines, distributed systems, or photo mode? My inbox is open.

timeline.title: Open to work
timeline.detail: Looking for AI engineer / Python backend roles. Building in public on GitHub in the meantime.

timeline.title: AI engineering, project by project
timeline.detail: Completed a structured, project-based AI engineering path: a version-aware RAG assistant (~90% top-3 retrieval accuracy, hallucinations cut from 6/20 to 1/20 on an eval set), and an autonomous research agent with a hand-rolled tool-calling loop.

timeline.title: Master of Computer Applications
timeline.detail: CGPA 8.19. Major project: a distributed file system with chunking, replication and AES-256-GCM encryption — which later grew into the desktop app below.
